records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Ergh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Ergh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Ergh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shh! Keep it down...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shh! Keep it down...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shh! Keep it down...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you see it? One flick of that thing's hand and people's torsos vanished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you see it? One flick of that thing's hand and people's torsos vanished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you see it? One flick of that thing's hand and people's torsos vanished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't want to end up the same, hold it in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't want to end up the same, hold it in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't want to end up the same, hold it in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment we called for backup, a monster like that showed up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment we called for backup, a monster like that showed up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment we called for backup, a monster like that showed up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, there are still civilians who couldn't evacuate. What's your plan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, there are still civilians who couldn't evacuate. What's your plan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, there are still civilians who couldn't evacuate. What's your plan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We get them out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We get them out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We get them out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're waiting for us to save them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're waiting for us to save them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're waiting for us to save them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that big-mouthed C.O. going to sit still while we rescue people?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that big-mouthed C.O. going to sit still while we rescue people?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that big-mouthed C.O. going to sit still while we rescue people?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll draw its attention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll draw its attention.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll draw its attention.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was born and raised in Lotus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was born and raised in Lotus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was born and raised in Lotus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a hard place to live, and crime runs rampant...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a hard place to live, and crime runs rampant...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a hard place to live, and crime runs rampant...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the Administration at least should keep order and pursue justice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Administration at least should keep order and pursue justice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Administration at least should keep order and pursue justice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll lure it with an Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll lure it with an Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll lure it with an Eternium Resonance Pulse Generator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While I do, get the civilians who haven't evacuated yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While I do, get the civilians who haven't evacuated yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While I do, get the civilians who haven't evacuated yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Move, all of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Move, all of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Move, all of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not turning people's lives into a meaningless death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not turning people's lives into a meaningless death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not turning people's lives into a meaningless death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You gobbled down all that Eternium and you're still hungry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You gobbled down all that Eternium and you're still hungry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You gobbled down all that Eternium and you're still hungry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on... here is the Eternium you like!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on... here is the Eternium you like!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on... here is the Eternium you like!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem pretty riled up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem pretty riled up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem pretty riled up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Let's finish this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Let's finish this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Let's finish this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, you bastard!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, you bastard!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, you bastard!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like a Category 4 C.O. has already emerged.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like a Category 4 C.O. has already emerged.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like a Category 4 C.O. has already emerged.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It forced its way up using Eternium as a catalyst, maybe?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It forced its way up using Eternium as a catalyst, maybe?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It forced its way up using Eternium as a catalyst, maybe?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not hurt, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not hurt, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not hurt, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the looks of it, you lured that thing all by yourself. That's impressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the looks of it, you lured that thing all by yourself. That's impressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the looks of it, you lured that thing all by yourself. That's impressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-who are you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-who are you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-who are you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, trying to bait a Category 4 C.O. alone is too risky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, trying to bait a Category 4 C.O. alone is too risky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, trying to bait a Category 4 C.O. alone is too risky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, you held out bravely. Well done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, you held out bravely. Well done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, you held out bravely. Well done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take it from here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take it from here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take it from here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy Commander, we've entered ARC-EX.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy Commander, we've entered ARC-EX.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy Commander, we've entered ARC-EX.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aside from the Eater headed your way, the rest look handleable on our end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aside from the Eater headed your way, the rest look handleable on our end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aside from the Eater headed your way, the rest look handleable on our end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take care of things here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take care of things here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take care of things here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do that. Keep the kids safe and manage them well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do that. Keep the kids safe and manage them well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do that. Keep the kids safe and manage them well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, Yegor, can you provide fire support here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, Yegor, can you provide fire support here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, Yegor, can you provide fire support here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. The coordinates are already marked by our <color=#ffd34c>reliable observer</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. The coordinates are already marked by our <color=#ffd34c>reliable observer</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. The coordinates are already marked by our <color=#ffd34c>reliable observer</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, when shall I start?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, when shall I start?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, when shall I start?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh heh, idiots who dare invade our world need a hot welcome right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh heh, idiots who dare invade our world need a hot welcome right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh heh, idiots who dare invade our world need a hot welcome right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze. Ready for combat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze. Ready for combat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Administration 9th Artillery Division Maze. Ready for combat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Target is the swarm of C.O.s our brave junior drew out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Target is the swarm of C.O.s our brave junior drew out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Target is the swarm of C.O.s our brave junior drew out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's present our enemies with a blizzard of steel.
